tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def prs-without-linear-closes (filter (fn [pr] (nil? (:closes_linear pr))) all-prs))

(def prs-with-many-additions (filter (fn [pr] (> (:additions pr) 400)) prs-without-linear-closes))

(def repos-with-prs (distinct (map :repo prs-with-many-additions)))
